name: teacher time table  schedule
script: frappe.ui.form.on('Teacher Weekly Schedule', { refresh: function(frm) { if (!frm.doc.week\_start) { var today = frappe.datetime.get\_today(); var day\_of\_week = new Date(today).getDay(); var offset = day\_of\_week === 0 ? -6 : 1 - day\_of\_week; frm.set\_value('week\_start', frappe.datetime.add\_days(today, offset)); } frm.add\_custom\_button('Show Schedule', function() { render\_grid(frm); }).addClass('btn-primary'); frm.add\_custom\_button('Previous Week', function() { frm.set\_value('week\_start', frappe.datetime.add\_days(frm.doc.week\_start, -7)); }); frm.add\_custom\_button('Next Week', function() { frm.set\_value('week\_start', frappe.datetime.add\_days(frm.doc.week\_start, 7)); }); if (!frm.doc.grid\_html) { frm.set\_df\_property('grid\_html', 'options', '  Select an instructor and click **Show Schedule**.  '); } } }); function render\_grid(frm) { if (!frm.doc.instructor || !frm.doc.week\_start) { frappe.msgprint('Please select an instructor first.'); return; } frappe.call({ method: 'get\_instructor\_weekly\_timetable', type: 'POST', args: { instructor: frm.doc.instructor, week\_start: frm.doc.week\_start }, callback: function(r) { var records = r.message || []; var days = ['Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri', 'Sat']; var by\_date = {}; for (var i = 0; i < records.length; i++) { var d = records[i].date; if (!by\_date[d]) by\_date[d] = []; by\_date[d].push(records[i]); } var dates = []; for (var i = 0; i < 6; i++) { dates.push(frappe.datetime.add\_days(frm.doc.week\_start, i)); } var max\_rows = 0; for (var i = 0; i < dates.length; i++) { if (by\_date[dates[i]] && by\_date[dates[i]].length > max\_rows) { max\_rows = by\_date[dates[i]].length; } } var html = '  | Time |'; for (var i = 0; i < days.length; i++) { html += ' ' + days[i] + '' + dates[i] + ' |'; } html += ' | --- | --- | '; for (var row = 0; row < max\_rows; row++) { html += '|  |'; for (var i = 0; i < dates.length; i++) { var entry = by\_date[dates[i]] ? by\_date[dates[i]][row] : null; if (entry) { html += ' **' + entry.from\_time + ' - ' + entry.to\_time + '**' + entry.course + '' + (entry.student\_group || '') + ' · ' + (entry.room || '') + ' |'; } else { html += '  |'; } } html += ' '; } html += ' '; if (!records.length) { html = '  **Oops!** No schedule was made for this week.  '; } frm.set\_df\_property('grid\_html', 'options', html); } }); }
